$status: PROPOSED — pending Rami sign-off. DO NOT wire into the app or future/ until approved.
$purpose: Single source of truth for proof / brand facts shared by Vela (public/) and future (data/). Unblocks A3 + B3.
$how_to_read: Settled fields carry a plain value. Contested fields are objects with decision_needed:true, a recommended value, and an options[] array showing each repo's current figure with its source. Resolve every decision_needed block, then collapse it to the chosen value before this file goes canonical.

roai.conflict: Vela defines TWO forms in data.jsx (a multiple and a percent), and the README states a third phrasing. Pick ONE canonical headline definition + formula so both repos and all collateral agree.

options.example: $4 of value per $1 of AI spend = 4.0×

options.definition: ROAI % = (Value delivered − AI cost) ÷ AI cost × 100

roai.note: Recommend keeping BOTH as derived views (headline = multiple, e.g. 4.2×; secondary = %), but the canonical DEFINITION sentence shown in tooltips/decks must be a single agreed string.

credentials.conflict: Vela headlines all-partner totals (1,000+ engineers / 1,500+ certs across Adobe+Sitecore+Salesforce+Liferay+Shopify). future headlines Salesforce-specific figures (340+ certified experts / 760+ certs). NOTE: Vela's own Salesforce line is 330+ engineers / 770+ certs — essentially the SAME population future is quoting. So the conflict is one of SCOPE, not of fact: 'all CX-practice partners' vs 'Salesforce only'. Decide which number is the public headline and label it unambiguously.

options.headline: 1,000+ certified engineers · 1,500+ platform certifications
options.scope: show the all-partner total as the headline and the Salesforce figure as a labeled sub-stat, so the two numbers stop reading as a contradiction

fpt_parent.conflict: These facts exist in future (per issue) but are ABSENT from Vela. Decide the canonical parent block and whether Vela should surface it. ALSO: verify the Agentforce ARR figure — $1.4B / 330% YoY reads like Salesforce's GLOBAL Agentforce number, not an FPT-owned metric; quoting it as an FPT proof point is risky. Confirm attribution + source before it ships.

agentforce_arr.label: Agentforce ARR (YoY growth)
agentforce_arr.attribution_warning: Confirm whether this is Salesforce global Agentforce ARR or an FPT-specific figure; label accordingly or drop.

case_studies.conflict: Vela and future use different case framing (per issue). Below are Vela's current four canonical cases; confirm these are the official set and reconcile any future-side equivalents.

pricing_tiers.conflict: Three different tier vocabularies are in play. Issue #5 names Discovery / Pilot / Enterprise. Vela's Metronome packages are Starter / Growth / Scale / Enterprise. Vela client plans are Growth / Scale / Enterprise. Pick ONE canonical tier ladder and naming.
pricing_tiers.note: If Discovery/Pilot/Enterprise wins, the Metronome package seed (seed-packages.mjs) and client plan labels need to be remapped — flag as A3/B3 follow-up.

methodology_lifecycle.conflict: Lifecycle/methodology copy is not centrally defined. Vela expresses a funnel-stage model on ON.Ecosystem products (Attract → Discover → Engage → Convert → Optimize) and six CX pillars. Confirm the canonical lifecycle vocabulary and pillar list.
